# Examples

This folder provides three Week 2 usage modes.

## 1) CLI mode

```bash
hallucination-lens --context "Paris is the capital of France." --response "Paris is in France." --pretty
```

## 2) Script mode

```bash
python examples/score_single.py
python examples/score_batch.py
```

## 3) API mode

Start the API service first:

```bash
uvicorn hallucination_lens.api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8003 --reload
```

Then call it using the example client:

```bash
python examples/api_client.py
```
